signals.raw: **Republican candidates declared:** Gregg Hull (Rio Rancho mayor, launched campaign in October 2025), Jim Ellison (former energy regulator, launched Tuesday per Fox), Duke Rodriguez (former Human Services secretary, already declared with Gary Johnson endorsement), Doug Turner (launched February 2026), plus others like Steve Lanier[1][2][3][4].
